identity.name: Guido Tomasella
identity.kicker: Data Governance · Data Quality · Data Engineering · AI
identity.tagline: I make data trustworthy, then build the agents that keep it that way.

amplifier.message: Policies stop living in slide decks — agents read the catalog, flag drift, and write the documentation themselves.
Checks run ahead of the pipeline, not after the complaint — rules catch bad data before it ships.
Pipelines that used to need a ticket and a week now get an agent that audits, drafts, and proposes the fix.
Claude and LangChain aren't side projects — they're teammates wired into governance, roadmaps, and Jira itself.

experience.summary: Built the data governance practice from zero and federated it across five LatAm countries, then put AI agents on top to keep it running itself.

experience.role: Data Governance Team Leader & Tech Lead
experience.summary: Brought order to a multi-terabyte data estate with hundreds of pipelines and stood up the company's first real governance layer.
Turned a video datacenter's operations into a data-centric practice, setting the foundation for everything that came after.

projects.title: MCP Data Agents
projects.description: A small fleet of autonomous agents — Jira auditor, auto-documentation, roadmap generator — that work the data catalog so people don't have to.

projects.title: LangGraph RAG System
projects.description: A hybrid retrieval engine with self-correcting search and reasoning loops, built to answer real questions about real data.

projects.title: PySpark Data Quality Framework
projects.description: The shift from finding bad data after the fact to catching it before it ever reaches a dashboard.
